ddt:Target.Name: AAM_X82_X62Ph1_Ph2_SW5_v1.2
ddt:Target.Description:
09/10/2019
Author: Georgiana RANGHIUC
Removed X82Ph2 applicability - New database for X82Ph2: AAM_Gen2_V1.0.xml
Changed name to: AAM_X82_X62Ph1_Ph2_SW5_v1.2
============================================================================
04/10/2019
Author: Georgiana RANGHIUC
Added X82Ph2 applicability
Changed name to: AAM_X82_X62Ph1_Ph2_SW5_v1.1
============================================================================
19/03/2019
Author: Nistor SEBASTIAN
Added auto-ident SW5.02
Changed name to: AAM_X82_X62Ph1_Ph2_SW5_v1 ============================================================================
version actuelle: prise en compte du retour DIAG sur le fait que la case d'officialisation de la base n'était pas cochée
version précédente: MAJ des écrans (séparation X62Ph1' / X82) Suppression des requêtes 2206 non implémentées dans le SW MAJ de la version SW dans l'auto-identification

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

Data.Name: AAMProductionNumber_ASCII
Data.Comment: numéro de série unique de l'AAM

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Label.Text: Write datas (you have to be in diagnostic session)
!!! Be careful : the configuration can be written only once !!!

Screen.Name: 1- Read/Write Logical and PWM Outputs state

Label.Text: Read/Write Logical and PWM Outputs state

Screen.Name: 3- Read/Write Power Outputs Supplied State when engine is stopped

Label.Text: Read/Write Power Outputs Supplied State when engine is stopped

Screen.Name: 5.1- READ CAN Customization of Logical Outputs

Label.Text: READ X62 AND X82 CAN Customization of Logical Outputs

Screen.Name: 5.2- READ CAN Customization of PWM Outputs

Label.Text: READ X62 and X82 CAN Customization of PWM Outputs

Screen.Name: 5.3- READ CAN Customization of Power Outputs

Label.Text: READ X62 AND X82 CAN Customization of Power Outputs

Screen.Name: 6.1.1- WRITE CAN Customization of X82 Logical Outputs

Label.Text: WRITE X82 CAN Customization of Logical Outputs

Screen.Name: 6.1.2- WRITE CAN Customization of X62Ph1' Logical Outputs

Label.Text: WRITE X62 CAN Customization of Logical Outputs

Screen.Name: 6.2.1- WRITE CAN Customization of X82 PWM Outputs

Label.Text: WRITE X82 CAN Customization of PWM Outputs

Screen.Name: 6.2.2- WRITE CAN Customization of X62Ph1' PWM Outputs

Label.Text: WRITE X62 CAN Customization of PWM Outputs

Screen.Name: 6.3.1- WRITE CAN Customization of X82 Power Outputs

Label.Text: Write X82 CAN Customization of Power Outputs

Screen.Name: 6.3.2- WRITE CAN Customization of X62Ph1' Power Outputs

Label.Text: Write X62 CAN Customization of Power Outputs
